# Get Paper IDs

Get Paper IDs

## Usage

``` r
paper_id(paper)
```

## Arguments

- paper:

  a paper or paperlist

## Value

a vector of paper_ids

## Examples

``` r
paper_id(psychsci)
#>   [1] "0956797613520608"  "0956797614522816"  "0956797614527830" 
#>   [4] "0956797614557697"  "0956797614560771"  "0956797614566469"
```
